blocks.text: Tuscany's gravel opens the classics season — then Barcelona face San Mamés
🚴 Strade Bianche 12:00 — Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on the iconic Tuscan gravel roads
Hovland is marooned at T35 (E) as Berger runs away with Bay Hill at -13. NRK's headline said it all: a tough finish ruined Hovland's best round. Final day, but the gap is insurmountable.

blocks.label: 🏆 CL first legs — three nights of knockout football
items: ⚽ Tue 21:00 — Barcelona at Newcastle United, St. James' Park
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP — Norway's biggest CL night ever
